positive: Minimalist geometric pattern featuring interconnected mountain ranges and abstract constellations. Flat vector art style, Bauhaus influence, limited color palette of teal, mustard yellow, and burnt orange. Seamless pattern design, clean lines, scalable for print. --ar 16:9
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, gradients, shadows, messy, photographic
